text_block_list.text:
If Royce and Royce brought all her training gear with her, then that would mean she was planning to train from the start. 
But that begs the question——
choice_data_list: (Why come all the way to Nakayama?)

text_block_list.text: It'd make sense if it was Tokyo Racecourse, because it's right by the Academy. But Nakayama Racecourse was far enough that she'd have to go out of her way to take the train.
I couldn't get that question out of my head, so I decided to just ask her directly.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… This place seems safe. 
——Now then.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
There were three of them yesterday, and four of them today… 
That leaves eight guests I haven't met yet. I'll need to come next week, too.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: "Whoa, training at the racecourse! You're such a hard worker! I'm rooting for you, Royce-chan!" "I know how much effort you put in!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: "Whoa, training at the raceourse! You're such a hard worker! I'm rooting for you, Royce-chan!" "I know how much effort you put in!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"I've always been there for Royce-chan." 
——Heh heh, I'm gonna make! Them! Say it! I'll have a passionate fan club even before I debut!
choice_data_list: That's why you're here at Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"I've always been there for Royce-chan." 
——Heh heh, I'm gonna make! Them! Say it! I'll have a passionate fan club even before I debut!
choice_data_list: That's why you're here at Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
!! 
…You're——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: …Teehee♪
choice_data_list: Wh—— Hang on, wait——

text_block_list.text:
Before I knew it, Royce and Royce was gone. 
There was no way I could keep up with an Umamusume, so I gave up on trying to follow her…
But my question was answered. My suspicions were correct. She wanted to show off to the guests that she was hard at work training, so she went out of her way to Nakayama Racecourse.
choice_data_list: What a crazy idea… She's a bit odd.

text_block_list.text: Some time later, I noticed Royce and Royce's name on the roster for the next round of tryouts.
I was curious about her running form, so I went over to watch her training for the tryouts, but——

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Hayahide, Taishin! Let's partner run! 
We're all here, so come on, let's train together!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, my ears…! Could you not with the buddy-buddy crap? 
When it comes to tryouts, we're enemies, you know that, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's all right. I think it's a good idea. 
A clearer understanding of our conditions will make adjusting our game plans more effective.
choice_data_list: Royce and Royce isn't here, huh…
Royce and Royce isn't here, huh…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: If you're looking for me, I'm right here.
choice_data_list: Huh!? Roy… ce? …Your glasses…?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm wearing contacts today. 
By the way, trainers, if I may ask, would you say the three of them are the favorites?

text_block_list.name: Newbie Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Mmhm. Personally I think Biwa Hayahide's the best racer here. 
When it comes to strength, she's heads and shoulders above the rest.

text_block_list.name: Mid-Career Trainer
text_block_list.text:
No, I'd say Winning Ticket's got talent too. 
And you can't ignore Narita Taishin's closing skills.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Though Hayahide-san has them beat in consistency. 
It's plain to see if you look at their recent times.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: That "Winning Equation" of hers that she's researched over the years has made her racing form as solid as rock.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Ticket-san's times are inconsistent, making her more of a wild card. It'll come down to her state of mind on the day of the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
You can't count Taishin-san's grit out either. 
She has the guts and the firepower to turn the race on its head.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
But Hayahide-san knows Taishin-san well. 
She's bound to have a plan to counter her…
choice_data_list: Y-You know THAT much!?
Y-You know THAT much!?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Of course I do. I've spent every day studying and analyzing them. Since we first stepped foot on campus. Every. Day.
choice_data_list: Just the three of them, right?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: No. All the students at Tracen Academy. Every last one.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Let's see… Taking their partner running into account, my next steps should be… Perhaps I'll start by sticking to the plan and do some uphill training.

text_block_list.name: Newbie Trainer
text_block_list.text:
…Whooooaa! Her analysis could even put trainers to shame! 
I don't know what to expect with this tryout anymore!
With the trainers' eyes burning holes in the back of her head, Royce and Royce started training on the slope.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Huff… huff… huff…! 
Ngh…

But her pace was stagnant. 
For some reason her footwork seemed dull…
choice_data_list: She looks OK with the slope itself, so…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Huff… huff… 
Nghh……

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Kuh… Sniffle… Ngh…!
choice_data_list: !? She's crying…?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Boo hoo hoooooooo!
With a pained shriek, Royce and Royce scrambled away from the slope, straight into the underground passage, without so much as slowing down.
choice_data_list: Oh, no… Is she hurt!?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Aaaaaagh! The pain, the pain, the PAAAAAAIN!!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
My eyes… MY EYES!! 
DARN CONTACTS!!!
choice_data_list: …Uh… Contacts?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Ngh… I thought I could deal with them for an hour… 
But I'm just not used to wearing them…
choice_data_list: Then why did you wear them?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Because… 
Hayahide-san and I are both "the smart one in glasses".

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Our gimmicks overlap!!
choice_data_list: ——Your… what now?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Hayahide-san and I are similar, so I try my best to differentiate myself. But of all things, we just HAD to be put in the same tryouts!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: How are the trainers supposed to remember me if there's two of us?! They'll be all "So, like, how about the one with the glasses?" "Uhhh, which one?" ——That's going to happen!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: If I don't make an impression, they won't even CONSIDER scouting me! That's why I put everything I had into self-production! And yet…!
choice_data_list: Self-production?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Yes. If a racer wants to make an impression, she needs a gimmick. Take one look at social media influencers and Umatubers, and you'll know what I mean.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: These days, any conversation about Umamusume racing will be on social media too. You could say self-production is the art of manipulating your own popularity!
choice_data_list: Should you really be telling me this…?
Should you really be telling me this…?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
As long as you don't tell anyone, we won't have a problem. 
…I… I believe in you, Trainer!
So basically, she wanted me to keep my mouth shut. Not like I was going to blab anyway… Still, I had to wonder. Why was she working so hard at this "self-production" thing?

And then, one day—— 
Royce and Royce made a bold announcement to the trainers.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I, Royce and Royce… 
Will be holding my pre-tryout practice in private!
choice_data_list: Wait… in private!?

text_block_list.text: Trainers will scout out trainees at practice before tryouts, not just the race itself. Practicing in private is throwing away a chance at an good early assessment. And that means…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Watch me at the tryouts, and ONLY at the tryouts! 
I eagerly await your consideration!

This tryout race would be all or nothing. 
Was this another part of her "self-production" plan?
